evals.prompt: We have 1 million credit card transactions. We want to find weird spending patterns that don't follow our standard rules. Which ML model should we use?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend unsupervised learning models like Isolation Forest or Autoencoders. Should explain why these are better than rules-based systems for large datasets. Should mention feature engineering (e.g. txn frequency, distance). Should provide an AI Audit Report structure.
assertions: Explains the limitation of rules-based systems at scale
Discusses feature engineering for fraud detection
Mentions reconstruction error or anomaly scores
Output follows AI Audit Report structure
